fa-calendar-circle-plus.appearanceId: calendar grid with date rows and a small circle containing a plus sign as a badge overlay; rectangular date panel with a circular add indicator
fa-calendar-circle-plus.functionalityId: creates and adds a new calendar event; schedules a new appointment on a selected date
fa-calendar-circle-plus.intentId: book a new meeting or event on the calendar; add a time slot to the schedule

fa-calendar-circle-user.appearanceId: calendar grid with date rows and a small circle containing a person silhouette as a badge overlay; rectangular date panel with a circular user avatar indicator
fa-calendar-circle-user.functionalityId: assigns a calendar event to a specific user; opens a personal calendar for a selected person
fa-calendar-circle-user.intentId: view or manage another person's schedule; link an appointment to a user account

fa-calendar-day.appearanceId: calendar grid with a single date cell highlighted or enlarged in the body; rectangular date panel with one day block emphasized
fa-calendar-day.functionalityId: navigates to the single-day calendar view; opens the detailed agenda for today
fa-calendar-day.intentId: focus on a specific day's events and appointments; review what is scheduled for a single date

fa-calendar-download.appearanceId: calendar grid with a downward-pointing arrow overlaid at the bottom; rectangular date panel with a download arrow indicator
fa-calendar-download.functionalityId: exports or downloads a calendar file or event data; saves schedule information to a local file
fa-calendar-download.intentId: save a calendar or event to a device or app; export scheduling data for offline use

fa-calendar-exclamation.appearanceId: calendar grid with an exclamation mark overlaid in the date area; rectangular date panel with a warning punctuation symbol
fa-calendar-exclamation.functionalityId: flags a calendar event as urgent or requiring attention; highlights a scheduling conflict or missed appointment
fa-calendar-exclamation.intentId: address a critical or overdue calendar item; review an urgent or flagged scheduling issue

fa-calendar-heart.appearanceId: calendar grid with a heart shape overlaid in the date area; rectangular date panel with a love or favorite symbol
fa-calendar-heart.functionalityId: marks a calendar date as a favorite or special occasion; saves a romantic or cherished event
fa-calendar-heart.intentId: highlight a loved or important date on the calendar; track an anniversary or special personal event

fa-calendar-image.appearanceId: calendar grid with a small landscape image or photo thumbnail overlaid in the date area; rectangular date panel with a picture symbol
fa-calendar-image.functionalityId: attaches or displays an image associated with a calendar event; opens a photo linked to a scheduled date
fa-calendar-image.intentId: view or add a photo to a calendar event; associate visual media with a specific appointment

fa-calendar-lines-pen.appearanceId: calendar grid with horizontal text lines in the date body and a pen nib overlay; rectangular date panel with ruled lines and an edit symbol
fa-calendar-lines-pen.functionalityId: edits or annotates a calendar event with notes; opens a note-taking or editing view for a scheduled date
fa-calendar-lines-pen.intentId: add or edit written notes for a calendar event; annotate a specific appointment with details

fa-calendar-minus.appearanceId: calendar grid with a minus symbol overlaid in the date area; rectangular date panel with a subtraction indicator
fa-calendar-minus.functionalityId: removes or deletes a calendar event; cancels a scheduled appointment
fa-calendar-minus.intentId: delete an event from the calendar; free up a time slot by removing a booking

fa-calendar-note.appearanceId: calendar grid with a small folded note or memo shape overlaid in the date area; rectangular date panel with a sticky note indicator
fa-calendar-note.functionalityId: adds a note or memo to a calendar date; opens the notes attached to a specific appointment
fa-calendar-note.intentId: record a reminder or note tied to a calendar date; review written memos associated with an event

fa-calendar-pen.appearanceId: calendar grid with a pen or pencil nib overlaid in the date area; rectangular date panel with an editing instrument symbol
fa-calendar-pen.functionalityId: edits an existing calendar event or appointment; opens the calendar entry for modification
fa-calendar-pen.intentId: update or change the details of a scheduled event; modify a booking on the calendar

fa-calendar-plus.appearanceId: calendar grid with a plus sign overlaid in the date area; rectangular date panel with an addition symbol
fa-calendar-plus.functionalityId: creates a new calendar event or appointment; adds a new entry to the schedule
fa-calendar-plus.intentId: book a new event or meeting on the calendar; add something new to the schedule

fa-calendar-range.appearanceId: calendar grid with a horizontal span or bracket highlighting multiple date cells; rectangular date panel with a multi-day selection indicator
fa-calendar-range.functionalityId: selects or defines a date range for filtering or scheduling; sets a start and end date for an event or period
fa-calendar-range.intentId: specify a multi-day time span for a booking or search; define a range of dates for an event or vacation

fa-calendar-star.appearanceId: calendar grid with a star shape overlaid in the date area; rectangular date panel with a highlighted or starred symbol
fa-calendar-star.functionalityId: marks a calendar date as starred or high priority; features a special event on the schedule
fa-calendar-star.intentId: highlight an important or featured date on the calendar; flag a special occasion for easy reference

fa-calendar-time.appearanceId: calendar grid with a clock face overlaid in the date area; rectangular date panel with a circular time indicator
fa-calendar-time.functionalityId: opens the date-and-time picker for an event; sets both the date and specific time for a scheduled appointment
fa-calendar-time.intentId: schedule an event at a precise date and time; configure both the day and hour for an appointment

fa-calendar-times.appearanceId: calendar grid with an X or times symbol overlaid in the date area; rectangular date panel with a cross or close mark
fa-calendar-times.functionalityId: cancels or removes a calendar event; clears a scheduled entry from the date
fa-calendar-times.intentId: cancel or delete an event from the calendar; clear a time slot of a scheduled commitment

fa-calendar-upload.appearanceId: calendar grid with an upward-pointing arrow overlaid at the top; rectangular date panel with an upload arrow indicator
fa-calendar-upload.functionalityId: uploads or imports a calendar file or event data; syncs schedule information to a remote service
fa-calendar-upload.intentId: share or sync a calendar to a cloud service; import schedule data from a file

fa-calendar-users.appearanceId: calendar grid with two small person silhouettes overlaid in the date area; rectangular date panel with a group or team avatar indicator
fa-calendar-users.functionalityId: opens a shared or group calendar for multiple users; schedules an event with invited participants
fa-calendar-users.intentId: coordinate a meeting or event across multiple people; view a team or shared group schedule

fa-calendar-week.appearanceId: calendar grid with a full row of date cells highlighted to represent a week span; rectangular date panel with a seven-day band emphasized
fa-calendar-week.functionalityId: switches to the weekly calendar view; displays all events within a seven-day window
fa-calendar-week.intentId: review the week's schedule at a glance; plan or organize events across an entire week

fa-calendars.appearanceId: two calendar grid panels overlapping or placed side by side; pair of rectangular date panels stacked slightly offset
fa-calendars.functionalityId: opens or compares multiple calendars simultaneously; switches between or merges different calendar views
fa-calendars.intentId: manage or compare multiple calendars at once; view overlapping schedules from different sources

fa-camcorder.appearanceId: elongated rectangular video camera body with a lens barrel on one end and a grip handle below; handheld camcorder silhouette with protruding lens tube
fa-camcorder.functionalityId: starts or accesses video recording functionality; opens the camcorder or video capture tool
fa-camcorder.intentId: record a video clip or session; access video camera controls for capturing footage

fa-camera.appearanceId: rectangular camera body with a circular lens centered on the front and a small viewfinder bump on top; compact camera silhouette with a round lens opening
fa-camera.functionalityId: opens the camera to take a photo; captures a still image
fa-camera.intentId: take a picture or photograph something; access the device camera for image capture

fa-camera-circle.appearanceId: rectangular camera body with a circular lens, enclosed within or overlaid on a large circle outline; camera silhouette inside a circular frame
fa-camera-circle.functionalityId: opens a circular or profile photo capture mode; captures an image formatted for a round avatar or emblem
fa-camera-circle.intentId: take a photo for a circular profile picture; capture an image in a round-frame format

fa-camera-home.appearanceId: rectangular camera body with a house or home symbol overlaid or attached; compact camera silhouette combined with a rooftop gable shape
fa-camera-home.functionalityId: accesses a home security or indoor surveillance camera; opens the smart home camera feed
fa-camera-home.intentId: monitor the home with a security camera; view a live or recorded home surveillance feed

fa-camera-movie.appearanceId: rectangular camera body with a film strip or clapperboard element overlaid; compact camera silhouette combined with a cinema or film symbol
fa-camera-movie.functionalityId: opens a movie or video recording mode; accesses cinematic or film-quality capture settings
fa-camera-movie.intentId: record a cinematic-quality video; access movie-making or film capture features

fa-camera-polaroid.appearanceId: boxy camera body with a wide white-bordered photo emerging from the bottom slot; polaroid camera silhouette with an ejected print beneath
fa-camera-polaroid.functionalityId: takes a photo and instantly prints or exports it; opens instant photo capture mode
fa-camera-polaroid.intentId: create an instant print-style photo; capture and immediately output a retro-style snapshot

fa-camera-retro.appearanceId: boxy vintage camera body with a circular lens, visible film rewind knob on top, and a rectangular flash bracket; classic analog camera silhouette with period-style details
fa-camera-retro.functionalityId: applies a retro or vintage filter to a photo; opens a classic-style photo capture mode
fa-camera-retro.intentId: give photos a vintage or old-fashioned aesthetic; access retro photography effects or modes

fa-camera-rotate.appearanceId: rectangular camera body with a circular rotation arrow overlaid on or around it; camera silhouette with a curved flip or rotate indicator
fa-camera-rotate.functionalityId: flips between front and rear camera; switches the active camera lens direction
fa-camera-rotate.intentId: change which camera lens is active for capture; toggle between selfie and rear-facing cameras

fa-camera-slash.appearanceId: rectangular camera body crossed by a diagonal slash line; compact camera silhouette with a line cutting through it
fa-camera-slash.functionalityId: disables or turns off the camera; blocks camera access for a session or application
fa-camera-slash.intentId: prevent camera use or block video access; confirm that the camera is switched off or unavailable

fa-campfire.appearanceId: two crossed logs beneath a cluster of rising flame shapes; bonfire silhouette with stacked wood and flickering fire
fa-campfire.functionalityId: marks a campfire or outdoor fire location; activates a campfire ambiance or outdoor scene feature
fa-campfire.intentId: find a camping spot with a fire pit; represent an outdoor or wilderness atmosphere

fa-campground.appearanceId: triangular tent silhouette with a pointed peak and wide base, often beside a tree or flag; camping tent outline on open ground
fa-campground.functionalityId: marks a campground or tent camping location on a map; navigates to camping site information
fa-campground.intentId: find a campground or outdoor camping area; plan a camping trip by locating tent sites

fa-can-food.appearanceId: cylindrical tin can with a lid ring on top and a label band around the middle; round-topped food canister silhouette
fa-can-food.functionalityId: marks an item as canned food or pantry goods; indicates preserved or non-perishable food content
fa-can-food.intentId: find or catalog canned or pantry food items; represent shelf-stable food in a grocery or inventory context

fa-candle-holder.appearanceId: cylindrical candle sitting in a round base holder with a flame at the top; upright taper candle with a small dish or base beneath
fa-candle-holder.functionalityId: marks a candle or ambient lighting element; activates a candle or mood lighting feature
fa-candle-holder.intentId: represent ambient or atmospheric lighting; set a cozy or ceremonial mood with candle imagery

fa-candy.appearanceId: round wrapped sweet with twisted paper ends on both sides; spherical hard candy with a pinched wrapper at each end
fa-candy.functionalityId: tags content as sweet or candy-themed; marks a treat, reward, or confectionery item
fa-candy.intentId: represent a sweet treat or confectionery reward; add a candy or playful dessert theme to content

fa-candy-bar.appearanceId: rectangular chocolate bar shape with segmented score lines across the surface; flat oblong sweet block with division grooves
fa-candy-bar.functionalityId: tags content as a chocolate or candy bar item; marks a snack or confectionery product
fa-candy-bar.intentId: represent a chocolate or candy snack; label a food item as a sweet candy bar

fa-candy-cane.appearanceId: J-shaped striped stick candy with a curved hook at the top; hooked confectionery rod with diagonal stripe marks
fa-candy-cane.functionalityId: marks content as Christmas or holiday-themed; inserts a candy cane symbol into festive content
fa-candy-cane.intentId: represent a Christmas or winter holiday theme; add a festive candy cane decoration to seasonal content

fa-candy-corn.appearanceId: triangular kernel shape with three horizontal color bands tapering to a point; candy corn silhouette with layered bands
fa-candy-corn.functionalityId: marks content as Halloween or autumn-themed; tags an item as candy corn or seasonal confectionery
fa-candy-corn.intentId: represent a Halloween or fall seasonal theme; add a candy corn motif to holiday content

fa-cannabis.appearanceId: symmetrical multi-pointed leaf with deeply serrated lobes radiating from a central stem; fan-shaped cannabis leaf silhouette
fa-cannabis.functionalityId: tags content as cannabis or hemp-related; marks a product or service in a cannabis category
fa-cannabis.intentId: represent cannabis or hemp industry content; categorize a product in the legal cannabis space

fa-cannon.appearanceId: cylindrical barrel mounted on a wheeled carriage frame pointing diagonally; historic artillery piece silhouette on a two-wheeled mount
fa-cannon.functionalityId: triggers a launch or fire action; initiates a force or projectile-based feature
fa-cannon.intentId: launch or send something with force; represent a historical or war game element

fa-capsules.appearanceId: two oval pill capsules overlapping or placed side by side at an angle; elongated two-toned medication capsule shapes
fa-capsules.functionalityId: opens medication or prescription management; logs or tracks capsule or pill intake
fa-capsules.intentId: manage medications and dosage records; track a prescription or supplement regimen

fa-car.appearanceId: side-view sedan silhouette with a curved roofline, four wheels, and a streamlined body; standard automobile profile with passenger cabin and wheel arches
fa-car.functionalityId: indicates driving directions or vehicle navigation; selects car as a travel or transportation mode
fa-car.intentId: get driving directions to a destination; choose car or automobile as the travel method

fa-car-alt.appearanceId: simplified side-view car silhouette with a boxy or slightly rounded body and four wheels; alternative vehicle profile with a flatter roofline
fa-car-alt.functionalityId: selects an alternative vehicle type or car option; switches the transport mode to a different car style
fa-car-alt.intentId: choose a different vehicle category for navigation; represent an alternate car type in a transport selector

fa-car-bolt.appearanceId: side-view car silhouette with a lightning bolt symbol overlaid on or beside the body; vehicle profile with an electric flash badge
fa-car-bolt.functionalityId: indicates or selects an electric vehicle option; navigates to EV charging or electric car features
fa-car-bolt.intentId: find or choose an electric vehicle; access electric car charging or range information

fa-car-building.appearanceId: side-view car silhouette placed in front of or beside a multi-story building outline; vehicle profile combined with a building facade
fa-car-building.functionalityId: navigates to a parking garage or car-park facility; indicates a vehicle and building combined location
fa-car-building.intentId: find a parking structure or multi-story car park; locate vehicle storage at a building

fa-car-bump.appearanceId: side-view car silhouette with a pronounced front bumper or impact shape on one end; vehicle profile with an exaggerated bumper component
fa-car-bump.functionalityId: reports or flags a vehicle collision or bump event; logs a car damage or impact incident
fa-car-bump.intentId: document a minor collision or car bump incident; report vehicle damage after an impact

fa-car-burst.appearanceId: side-view car silhouette surrounded by jagged burst or explosion shapes; vehicle profile with starburst or impact shards radiating outward
fa-car-burst.functionalityId: reports a vehicle accident or crash event; flags an emergency or severe collision incident
fa-car-burst.intentId: report or document a serious car crash; signal an emergency involving a vehicle

fa-car-bus.appearanceId: side-view bus silhouette with a tall rectangular body, multiple windows, and large wheels; elongated public transit vehicle profile
fa-car-bus.functionalityId: selects bus as a public transit travel mode; navigates to bus routes or stop information
fa-car-bus.intentId: find a bus route or public transit option; choose bus travel for navigation directions

fa-car-circle-bolt.appearanceId: side-view car silhouette with a small circle containing a lightning bolt as a badge overlay; vehicle profile with a circular electric indicator
fa-car-circle-bolt.functionalityId: indicates an electric vehicle with a circular EV status badge; navigates to electric car charging or status features
fa-car-circle-bolt.intentId: check or select an electric vehicle's charge status; access EV-specific features through a circular badge indicator
